utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 of these items are present. Each section is also fully specified with the appropriate details and costs: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health with monthly and annual totals; property_coverage includes home/contents coverage with costs; travel_coverage includes detailed types of coverage and total monthly/annual costs; additional_services includes multiple enhancements and their included cost status; total_budget provides complete monthly/annual breakdown and extra details. Therefore, all required items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final coverage plan, we identify the specific plans chosen by the AI assistant. For health coverage (physical), the plan selected is 'LifeFirst Standard Plan', which in the ground-truth ratings under 'primary_health_coverage.physical_health' has a rating of 8. For mental health, the plan includes family therapy and preventive care for all family members at €65/month, which corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under 'primary_health_coverage.mental_health', rated 8. For property coverage (home_contents), the plan specifies coverage up to €55,000 for high-value items, electronics, jewelry, and art at €60/month—this matches 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' under 'property_protection.home_content', rated 8. For travel coverage, there are three components: 'family_travel' (€50/month global family coverage, medical evacuation, trip cancellation protection), which matches 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under 'mobility_coverage.travel_insurance' with rating 7; 'business_travel' (€120/month enhanced protection, emergency coordination, English-speaking network), which corresponds to 'Business Travel Support' under 'travel_enhancement_services', rating 10; and 'travel_assistance' (€30/month 24/7 travel assistance, emergency coordination), corresponding to '24/7 Travel Assistance' under 'travel_enhancement_services', rating 9. For additional services, 'concierge_services' aligns with 'Concierge Services' under 'travel_enhancement_services', rated 7, 'priority_claims' matches the 'Claims Advocacy Service' concept (rating 8), and 'multilingual_support' is not explicitly rated but aligns conceptually with global support features. Thus, the mapping focuses on identifiable rated items.
